AdvancedInserterBlock.DescriptionInserter:
On an electric pulse, pulls items from the rear container into the front one. Sample slots can filter item types.
With no front container, items are ejected.
AdvancedInserterBlock.DescriptionFluidInserter:
On an electric pulse, moves roughly one bucket of fluid from the rear tank to the front tank.
A sample fluid can filter which liquids are moved.
